relationships.description: Clicks buttons (set install path, sign in, skip/update, start game)

people.description: Build/feature engineer who edits plugins; BuildUnit descriptors are generated by the Build Service and optionally tuned (module/globs/rollout)
people.name: Developer

components.description: Main application loop - coordinates UI/download/install phases
components.name: Launcher.Core

components.description: Reads/writes config.ini (%APPDATA%/ALIS/Launcher/config.ini) with install path
components.name: Launcher.ConfigManager

relationships.description: Provides install path (or null on first run)

components.description: Handles OAuth sign-in flow, stores auth token, provides token to ProcessStarter
components.name: Launcher.Auth

components.description: Fetches remote manifest, compares with local, callbacks to UI if updates available
components.name: Launcher.ManifestUpdater

relationships.description: Callbacks if updates available (reports what needs updating)

components.description: Validates manifest signature + Authenticode thumbprints
components.name: Launcher.SignatureValidator

components.description: Downloads project/orchestrator/plugins from CDN with resume support
components.name: Launcher.DownloadManager

components.description: Verifies downloaded payloads against SHA-256 hashes from validated manifest (chain of trust: signed manifest -> trusted hashes -> verified archives)
components.name: Launcher.HashVerifier

components.description: Extracts downloaded payloads to install path
components.name: Launcher.Installer

relationships.description: Store plugin bundles (DLL + assets per manifest)

components.description: Manages base project package (.exe + .uproject with orchestrator reference)
components.name: Launcher.ProjectPackageStore

components.description: Manages plugin bundles (per-manifest DLL + cooked assets) for dependency tree coherence
components.name: Launcher.PluginBundleCache

components.description: Shows install path selection, update UI (what needs updating, skip option, download progress), start game button
components.name: Launcher.UI

relationships.description: Shows UI (install path selection, update options, download progress, sign-in button, start game)

components.description: Starts UE executable with auth token via secure IPC
components.name: Launcher.ProcessStarter

relationships.description: Get exe path from project package
Starts UE exe with config (auth token, manifest path, game install path) via secure IPC
Starts UE exe with config (auth token, manifest path, game install path) via secure IPC
UE exe starts -> Orchestrator Manager entry point receives config

components.description: Sends launcher telemetry (downloads, errors, timing) to monitoring service
components.name: Launcher.MonitoringSender

relationships.description: Starts UE executable, passes auth config via secure IPC
Starts UE executable, passes auth config via secure IPC
Shows UI (install path selection, update options, download progress, sign-in button, start game)
UE exe starts -> Orchestrator Manager entry point receives config

softwareSystems.description: Install path selection, compares local/remote manifests, shows update UI (what needs updating, skip option, download progress), downloads payloads from CDN, starts game
softwareSystems.name: Launcher

relationships.description: Starts UE executable, passes auth config via secure IPC
Starts UE executable, passes auth config via secure IPC
Shows UI (install path selection, update options, download progress, sign-in button, start game)
UE exe starts -> Orchestrator Manager entry point receives config

components.description: Entry point triggered by Launcher: reads manifest, loads all Boot plugin DLLs in dependency order, records manifest.entryPoint (e.g. MainMenuWorld) for ProjectLoading to execute via ILoadingService
components.name: Orchestrator Manager

relationships.description: Execute load/unload operations on optimized list (DLLs only)
Persist manifest.entryPoint from verified manifest/state (data only, no calls)

components.description: Reads local manifest.json (already verified by Launcher)
components.name: Orchestrator.ManifestParser

components.description: Transitive dependency resolution: walks dependency graph from entryPoint/requested plugin, queries PluginRegistry to skip loaded plugins, performs topological sort, outputs optimized load order. For unload: queries reverse dependencies (reference counting) to prevent unloading plugins that other loaded plugins depend on
components.name: Orchestrator.DependencyResolver

relationships.description: Query state to filter already-loaded plugins

components.description: Tracks plugin state: IsLoaded/Unloaded/Mounting, loaded versions, reverse dependency map (reference counting for safe unload). Query API: IsPluginLoaded, GetLoadedPlugins, GetPluginVersion, GetLoadedDependents (which loaded plugins depend on target)
components.name: Orchestrator.PluginRegistry

components.description: Stateless plugin operations: registers plugin metadata with IPluginManager, loads/unloads DLLs via FModuleManager. No IoStore/pak mounting (delegated to ProjectLoading)
components.name: Orchestrator.PluginLoader

components.description: Sends game telemetry (gameplay, crashes, perf) to monitoring service
components.name: Client.MonitoringSender

components.description: Data holder for entryPointExperience/MainMenuWorld. Written from verified manifest/state; fallback from config [/Script/Alis.AlisGI]. Read by ProjectLoading to start loading pipeline.
components.name: EntryPoint (manifest/state/config)

components.description: GameInstance class instantiated by UE; passive host for UProjectLoadingSubsystem (no loading logic, no entrypoint reads)
components.name: AlisGI (GameInstance)

relationships.description: GameInstance host only (engine-instantiated; no loading logic)

components.description: DIP abstraction layer: ILoadingService interface, service locator, foundation types
components.name: ProjectCore

components.description: 6-phase loading pipeline (implements ILoadingService)
components.name: ProjectLoading

components.description: ProjectLoading plugin entrypoint: GameInstance subsystem registers ILoadingService, schedules initial experience, and runs the 6-phase pipeline
components.name: ProjectLoading (ILoadingService)

relationships.description: Resolves EntryPointExperience from manifest/state (falls back to config)
1 ResolveAssets: validate request; resolve map/experience; soft-path fallback

components.description: Phase 1 - Validates FLoadRequest (MapAssetId or MapSoftPath), resolves map/experience, logs features, supports soft-path fallback
components.name: ResolveAssetsPhaseExecutor

relationships.description: 2 MountContent: stub; Orchestrator already mounted content

components.description: Phase 2 - Stub: content mounting handled by Orchestrator; skips unless ContentPacksToMount provided
components.name: MountContentPhaseExecutor

relationships.description: 3 PreloadCriticalAssets: stream map/experience with timeout + cancellation

components.description: Phase 3 - Preloads map/experience via StreamableManager with progress, timeout, and cancellation
components.name: PreloadCriticalAssetsPhaseExecutor

relationships.description: 4 ActivateFeatures: ensure requested feature modules loaded (Orchestrator-backed)

components.description: Phase 4 - Validates requested feature modules are loaded (delegated to Orchestrator when enabled)
components.name: ActivateFeaturesPhaseExecutor

relationships.description: 5 Travel: build travel URL; ServerTravel entry map

components.description: Phase 5 - Resolves map path (AssetId first, soft-path fallback), builds travel URL with options, calls ServerTravel
components.name: TravelPhaseExecutor

relationships.description: 6 Warmup: shader precompile + streaming level precache

components.description: Phase 6 - Optional shader precompile plus streaming level precache to reduce hitching
components.name: WarmupPhaseExecutor

components.description: Save/load service: slots, profiles, settings persistence
components.name: ProjectSave

components.description: PCG engine integration: runtime services, custom nodes
components.name: ProjectPCG

components.description: World Partition/HLOD services + UProjectWorldManifest data assets
components.name: ProjectWorld

components.description: Typed settings API: persistence, defaults, validation
components.name: ProjectSettings

components.description: Gameplay framework: FGameplayFeatureRegistry (FeatureName -> InitFn), FFeatureInitContext. Features self-register, attach own components.
components.name: ProjectGameplay

components.description: CommonUI + MVVM framework: widgets, screen stack
components.name: ProjectUI

components.description: Front-end menu (logic + screens)
components.name: ProjectMenuMain

relationships.description: Embed settings screens in main menu

components.description: In-game/pause menu
components.name: ProjectMenuGame

relationships.description: Embed settings screens in pause menu

components.description: Settings screens (uses ProjectSettings)
components.name: ProjectSettingsUI

relationships.description: MVVM widgets, screen stack for settings screens

components.description: Loaded on-demand via ILoadingService when gameplay requests inventory (ProjectLoading mounts content and drives phases)
components.name: ProjectInventory

components.description: Loaded on-demand via ILoadingService when gameplay requests combat systems (ProjectLoading mounts content and drives phases)
components.name: ProjectCombat

components.description: Loaded on-demand via ILoadingService when gameplay requests dialogue systems (ProjectLoading mounts content and drives phases)
components.name: ProjectDialogue

components.description: Consolidates UE layer (GM/PC/Pawn) + menu features
components.name: ProjectMenuPlay

components.description: Consolidates UE layer (GM/PC/Pawn) + game layer (Combat/Dialogue/Inventory)
components.name: ProjectSinglePlay

components.description: Consolidates UE layer + game layer + networking
components.name: ProjectOnlinePlay

components.description: Menu/frontend world composition
components.name: MainMenuWorld

components.description: Example gameplay world with urban environment
components.name: City17

components.description: Versioned object storage (MinIO/S3). Stores: /stage/{buildId}/* (staged uploads), /releases/units/{uuid}/{version}/{code.zip|content.utoc|content.ucas} (immutable IoStore artifacts), /releases/manifests/manifest*.json (current + 2 backups). Access limited to CDN components (ControlApi + Edge)
components.name: Cdn.ObjectStorage

components.description: Single ingress surface for Build Service. Streams uploads (multipart/chunked), writes staged objects internally, validates manifest structure/hashes, promotes to prod (atomic manifest.json overwrite + best-effort history rotation), handles rollback, performs auto-fallback if current manifest is missing/invalid
components.name: Cdn.ControlApi

relationships.description: Write staged objects during upload, copy stage -> releases during promote/rollback, rotate manifests after verify

components.description: Axum edge service (optionally fronted by Nginx/CDN). Serves GET /manifest.json (current release) with optional Claims-based filtering and GET /units/{uuid}/{version}/{code.zip|content.utoc|content.ucas} with entitlement checks + cache rules
components.name: Cdn.Edge

relationships.description: Serve manifest.json plus dual artifacts (code.zip, content.utoc, content.ucas) with entitlement-aware routing
Optional: verify auth token from launcher; retrieve player's owned plugins/entitlements (when token provided)

containers.description: Verifies staged builds, promotes manifests (blue/green with 3-slot history), serves static bundles
containers.name: CDN Infrastructure

relationships.description: Optional: verify auth token from launcher; retrieve player's owned plugins/entitlements (when token provided)
Optional: verify auth token; get player's owned plugins/entitlements (when token provided)

softwareSystems.description: Issues plugin claims (UUIDs) for authenticated tokens
softwareSystems.name: Claims Service

components.description: CLI entry point - parses args (branch, build-id, channel), orchestrates scan -> order -> build -> publish pipeline
components.name: Cli

relationships.description: 0) Baseline: invoke descriptor builder for project + plugins in scope
1) Scan: compute changed plugin list (descriptor hashes -> CLI memory)
2) Order: consume stored changed list and return dependency-safe build order
3) Build: run selected units via RunUAT/BuildGraph
4) Package: assemble code.zip + IoStore/loose assets, compute SHA-256 per artifact
5) Manifest: update manifest.json in Git (versions, hashes, CDN paths)
6) Publish: push artifacts/manifest via Control API upload + promote endpoints

components.description: Step 0 helper invoked by CLI to auto-create BuildUnit.yaml files for the root project (detected via .uproject) and any plugins missing descriptors. Computes code/config + content hashes without running UE.
components.name: BuildUnitBuilder

relationships.description: Query: read build history to optimize descriptor creation
Generate BuildUnit.yaml when missing (pre-build hashes only)

components.description: Reads BuildUnit.yaml descriptors (code/config + content hashes) to detect changes. If a descriptor is missing, the builder generates it before compiling the plugin (no Git diff fallback).
components.name: ChangeScanner

relationships.description: Read BuildUnit.yaml (auto baseline). Contains last code+config hash plus content hash (future utoc/ucas) and optional rollout metadata.

components.description: BuildUnit.yaml per plugin plus one at the project root (auto-created before the build runs). Stores uuid/module metadata plus last code+config hash and last content hash (future utoc/ucas). Designers can extend with custom globs and rollout rules.
components.name: BuildUnitDescriptors

components.description: Consumes the CLI-held changed plugin list, reads dependency graph (.uplugin + manifest), and returns a dependency-safe order (no implicit rebuilds unless configured in BuildUnit)
components.name: OrderPlanner

components.description: Invokes Unreal Automation Tool / BuildGraph (RunUAT BuildCookRun) to compile + cook + package selected units into per-unit artifacts (non-monolithic build)
components.name: UeBuildExecutor

relationships.description: Load/query/save: manages build state lifecycle (base release decisions, build history)

components.description: Bundles code.zip and collects standalone IoStore/loose assets (utoc/ucas/locres/etc.), computes SHA-256 for each, prepares manifest asset metadata
components.name: ArtifactPackager

components.description: Reads and writes manifest.json from Git repo (single source of truth), updates versions + hashes + CDN paths for changed units only
components.name: ManifestStore

components.description: Tracks base release versions, build history, and plugin changes. Persisted to YAML at tools/BuildService/state/build_state.yaml. Enables base release reuse and DLC workflow decisions.
components.name: BuildState

components.description: Streams artifacts/manifest to CDN Control API (single HTTPS plane: POST /builds/{buildId}/upload, POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote, POST /releases/rollback); no direct S3 access
components.name: CdnPublisher

relationships.description: Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback
Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback
Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback

containers.description: Dockerized CLI that scans changes, builds via UAT/BuildGraph, publishes to CDN
containers.name: Build Tool

relationships.description: Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback
Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback
Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback

softwareSystems.description: CI/CD builds and uploads plugins/manifest to CDN
softwareSystems.name: Build Service

relationships.description: Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback
Step 6: stream POST /builds/{buildId}/upload (artifacts+manifest) then POST /builds/{buildId}/verify-and-promote / POST /releases/rollback
